hypotheses.description: Investigate potential missing causal links between model components
hypotheses.rationale: Graph density is 0.14 (10 connections, 9 variables). Sparse graphs may miss important dependencies.

hypotheses.description: Add precision parameters to modulate sensory and policy uncertainty
hypotheses.rationale: The model lacks precision parameters. Active Inference with precision weighting better captures attentional modulation and epistemic confidence.

hypotheses.description: Define explicit planning horizon T for tractable policy inference
hypotheses.rationale: Unbounded time horizon requires truncation for policy selection. Setting T=3-5 enables efficient Expected Free Energy computation.

hypotheses.description: Add Dirichlet concentration parameters for online model learning
hypotheses.rationale: Static A and B matrices cannot adapt. Adding concentration parameters (a, b) enables Bayesian learning from experience.

hypotheses.description: Consider extending HMM to full POMDP with action-dependent transitions
hypotheses.rationale: HMMs have no action selection. Adding a B[states,states,actions] tensor and preference vector C enables Active Inference policy optimization.
